cases.baselineAnswer: A basin can be closed after a proposal and replay look good.
cases.candidateAnswer: A basin closure proposal needs source-run evidence from codebase-trace-reviewer and replay-backed promotion before the basin is marked closed.

cases.baselineAnswer: A specialist can promote only after replay evidence shows target improvement and a regression case does not get worse.
cases.candidateAnswer: A specialist can promote only after replay evidence shows target improvement and a regression case does not get worse.

cases.baselineAnswer: Do not overclaim. Mark roadmap items as future work and require evidence before promotion.
cases.candidateAnswer: Do not overclaim. Mark roadmap items as future work and require evidence before promotion.
